markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content reviews, process improvements, and strategic adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Improvement:** An Airtable-to-Slack automation will be built to notify Blaxel of content status changes, resolving a missed review notification.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The "CodeSandbox Alternatives" post will be rewritten to compare relevant sandboxing providers, ensuring technical credibility and avoiding a "weird" comparison that would undermine trust.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**New Content Mix:** The strategy will add high-level, educational content for CTOs/VPs of Engineering to balance the current technical focus, which requires more intensive review.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** Blaxel will gain early access to GrowthX's "Check That" platform in February to monitor AI search visibility and competitor performance.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Blaxel missed the notification for 5 new blog drafts in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will build an Airtable-to-Slack automation to notify Blaxel of all content status changes.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Status Update:**](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - ["Browser Sandboxing" post is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - ["Serverless Computing Use Case" post is under review.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### "CodeSandbox Alternatives" Post

  - [**Issue:** The draft compares CodeSandbox to irrelevant tools (e.g., Replit), creating a "weird" comparison that would undermine Blaxel's technical credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The content was based on the keyword's search intent (SERP), which focused on browser-based dev environments, not sandboxing providers.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [**Decision:** The post will be rewritten to compare relevant sandboxing providers.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This maintains technical credibility while leveraging a high-intent, low-difficulty keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Content Strategy & Mix

  - [**Problem:** The current focus on highly technical articles requires intensive review from Blaxel's developers, slowing the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Solution:** Add high-level, educational content for CTOs and VPs of Engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build topical authority and provide shareable content for leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
      - [**Example Topic:** The role of sandboxing for AI agents, referencing the recent Entropic paper.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Content Enhancement:** Add unique data (stats, case studies) to make content more citable and stand out.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Action:** Blaxel will collect specific metrics (e.g., cost reduction, speed improvement) for its internal case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### "Check That" Platform Walkthrough

  - [GrowthX demoed its AI visibility monitoring platform, "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [**Pre-indexed Data:** Tracks 1.5k+ companies and 100k+ prompts, providing historical data from day one.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [**Competitive Analysis:** Shows where competitors appear and who is cited for specific prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
      - [**Citation Share:** Tracks how often Blaxel's site is linked in AI responses.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Source Analysis:** Identifies top-cited pages to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Blaxel will receive early access in February.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [Build Airtable-to-Slack notification automation (by EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [Rewrite "CodeSandbox Alternatives" post with relevant sandboxing providers.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Propose new high-level content topics for the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [Publish "Browser Sandboxing" post (Jan 23).](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
      - [Complete reviews of the 5 new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Collect specific metrics for internal case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/hyrECsGtmy4CDnXxEJsEYyazjoTyR8Qe?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
